scripts.build: yarn run sync-control-extension-version && yarn workspace @ce/web-shared run build && yarn workspace @ce/web-app run build && yarn workspace @ce/web-server run build && yarn workspace @ce/web-server run build:app-assets
scripts.build:exe: node ./scripts/assert-build-win-supported.mjs && yarn run build && yarn workspace @ce/web-server run build:exe
scripts.check: yarn run tools:check && yarn run lint && yarn run test
scripts.check:lua: yarn run lint:lua && yarn run test:lua
scripts.check:web: yarn run lint:web && yarn run test:web
scripts.clean: yarn run clean:web && yarn run clean:docs && yarn run clean:lua
scripts.clean:web: yarn workspace @ce/web-app run clean && yarn workspace @ce/web-shared run clean && yarn workspace @ce/web-server run clean
scripts.dev:app: yarn workspace @ce/web-shared run build && node ./scripts/run-parallel.mjs "yarn workspace @ce/web-server run dev" "yarn workspace @ce/web-app run dev"
scripts.dev:storybook: yarn workspace @ce/web-shared run build && yarn workspace @ce/web-app run dev:storybook
scripts.format: yarn run format:apps && yarn run format:lua
scripts.lint: yarn run lint:lua && yarn run lint:server && yarn run lint:app && yarn run lint:shared
scripts.lint:web: yarn run lint:shared && yarn run lint:app && yarn run lint:server
scripts.run:app: yarn run build && yarn workspace @ce/web-server run run
scripts.test: yarn run test:lua && yarn run test:server && yarn run test:app && yarn run test:docs
scripts.test:app: yarn workspace @ce/web-shared run build && yarn workspace @ce/web-app run build && yarn workspace @ce/web-server run build:app-assets && node ./scripts/run-parallel.mjs "yarn workspace @ce/web-server run run:test" "yarn workspace @ce/web-app run test:e2e"
scripts.test:app:ui: yarn workspace @ce/web-shared run build && yarn workspace @ce/web-app run build && yarn workspace @ce/web-server run build:app-assets && node ./scripts/run-parallel.mjs "yarn workspace @ce/web-server run run:test" "yarn workspace @ce/web-app run test:e2e:ui"
scripts.test:server: yarn workspace @ce/web-shared run build && yarn workspace @ce/web-server exec tsc --build && yarn node ./scripts/run-server-tests.mjs
scripts.test:web: yarn run test:server && yarn run test:app
